strategies.strategy: Store public-safe red evidence as reviewed markdown/json artifacts.
strategies.removalCriteria: Later implementation PR replaces planned row with executable pass evidence.

strategies.strategy: Allow strict xfail only with issue-linked removal criteria.
strategies.removalCriteria: Owned row passes in executable gate or is reviewed/re-scoped.

strategies.strategy: Allow skipped tests only with explicit reason and later PR owner.
strategies.removalCriteria: Skip removed when owner PR implements row.

strategies.strategy: Matrix rows cannot use issue comments alone as evidence.
strategies.removalCriteria: Never removed; issue comments remain planning inputs only.
